---
title: "Agnes Johnstone"
---

## Agnes Johnstone

**Dates:** (b.1847/8)

**Maiden name:** (Chamberlayne)

### Description

daughter of Thomas Chamberlayne

### Biography

Daughter of Thomas Chamberlayne of Cranbury Park, Otterbourne, she married George CK Johnstone (b.1841/2) [1871, 1881 census]

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
